Name: Pattern Recognition - IND

Name: Ethical or Moral Reasoning - PE
Text: Rationale to include Coexistence Ensures that whenever a decision is made for a minority applicant a manual review must also occur Response Mandates that after evaluating a sensitive attribute the process must execute a bias mitigation check Nonchain succession Prevents an immediate decision right after checking a sensitive attribute

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: Prevent a direct succession from a sensitive attribute event to a decision event Ill stick to nonchainsuccession as requested by direct succession
